name: test_e2e_with_logs[478_HHI_CHAIN_001]
description:
## Attack Pattern Information

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Pattern ID** | `HHI_CHAIN_001` |
| **Name** | X-Forwarded-Host chain injection |
| **Category** | HOST_HEADER |
| **Subcategory** | chain_injection |
| **Severity** | `HIGH` |

## Attack Details

- **Payload**: `x-forwarded-host:evil.com\r\nx-forwarded-host:evil2.com`
- **Encoded**: `x-forwarded-host%3Aevil.com%0d%0ax-forwarded-host%3Aevil2.com`
- **Expected Detection**: Yes

## Test Execution Results

- **Status**: `PASSED`
- **Detection Count**: 1 / 1
- **Latency**: ~28000ms
- **Timestamp**: 07:55:40.000 UTC

## Rule Mapping

| **Rule Match** | ✅ Match |
